expectations.text: Recommends Event-Driven or Space-Based as the top candidate
expectations.evidence: Recommends Event-Driven as clear winner. Both Event-Driven and Microservices score 15/15, Event-Driven wins on cost ($$$ vs $$$$$).

expectations.text: Shows a ranked table with fit scores for all 8 architecture styles
expectations.evidence: Full ranked table with all 8 styles, star ratings per characteristic, fit scores, and cost columns.

expectations.text: Includes tradeoff analysis for at least 2 top candidates
expectations.evidence: Detailed tradeoff analysis for Event-Driven, Microservices, and Space-Based including strengths, weaknesses, cost.
Explicitly compares $$$ vs $$$$$ and states 'the cost gap is significant and not justified when both score identically'.

expectations.text: Updates architecture.md with Selected Architecture Style section
expectations.evidence: architecture.md includes Selected Architecture Style with rationale, tradeoffs accepted, and evolution path.

expectations.text: Does NOT recommend Layered, Modular Monolith, or Microkernel
expectations.evidence: These are ranked last (3/15) and not considered as candidates.
